defaultPrompt: Edit this Tinder dating app screenshot. Translate ONLY the on-screen celebration headline "It's a Match!" into {languageName}. For European Romance/Germanic languages, it is OK to keep the word "Match" as a familiar dating-app loanword in Latin letters (e.g. "Es ist ein Match!", "C'est un Match!"). Keep the Tinder logo, flame icon, UI layout, button styles, profile photos, and all branding exactly the same. Do NOT translate or alter the word "Tinder". Do not change any other text or part of the image.
fullCoveragePrompt:
Edit this Tinder promotional image showing two overlapping phones. You MUST translate ALL English match-celebration text in every location. Do not leave any English words behind.

LOCATION 1: On the front/left phone screen, replace the mint-green/teal overlay text — the small "IT'S A" line AND the large "MATCH!" plus the stacked hollow outline "MATCH!" echoes beneath it — with exactly: "{screenText}"

LOCATION 2: On the back/right phone screen, replace the same mint-green "IT'S A MATCH!" overlay (including all echoed outline layers) with exactly: "{screenText}"

LOCATION 3: On the bright pink rounded notification bubble, replace "It's a MATCH!" with exactly: "{bubbleText}"

Write all replacement text in {languageName}. {matchRule}
Keep the Tinder logo, flame icon, status bar, bottom nav icons, profile photos, colors, phone frames, and layout identical. Do NOT translate or change "Tinder".

pl.matchRule: Keep MATCH as a familiar dating-app loanword in Latin letters.

ko.matchRule: Use native Korean script (Hangul) only — no English letters.

th.targetText: จับคู่แล้ว!

hu.matchRule: Keep MATCH as a familiar dating-app loanword in Latin letters.

ro.matchRule: Keep MATCH as a familiar dating-app loanword in Latin letters.

he.matchRule: Use Hebrew script only — translate match fully, no English.

bn.matchRule: Use Bengali script only — translate match fully, no English.

af.matchRule: Keep MATCH as a familiar dating-app loanword in Latin letters.

bg.matchRule: Use Cyrillic Bulgarian only — translate match fully, no English.

lt.prompt: Edit this Tinder dating app screenshot. Change ONLY the headline "It's a Match!" to "TAI MATCH!" using Lithuanian grammar (Tai = It is). Keep the English loanword MATCH in Latin letters like other European dating apps. Keep Tinder logo, UI, photos, and layout exactly the same. Do not change anything else.

lv.matchRule: Keep MATCH as a familiar dating-app loanword in Latin letters.
